attacking_style: Opportunistic from breakaways with long-range solo efforts (18km+), using time-trial strength to sustain leads. Prioritizes tactical bonus seconds at intermediate sprints over stage wins when managing GC position.
team_tactics: DSM provides adequate defensive protection in chaos but shows no offensive ambition beyond jersey defense. Team operates in conservative mode once leader's jersey is secured, focusing on crash avoidance and positioning.
terrain_preference: Excels on sustained climbs where time-trial power applies. Vulnerable on steep, punchy gradients where pure climbing watts matter. Suited to stages where diesel strength outlasts pure climbers.
vulnerability: Exposed on short, steep finishing climbs where he loses time to GC rivals (lost 7 seconds twice on punchy gradients). Defensive position becomes precarious before specialist TT stages despite strong time-trialing ability.
key_patterns: Calculates GC through bonus seconds, deliberately taking intermediate sprints over stage wins (2 instances)
Lost time specifically on steep/punchy finishes while GC group stayed together (2 documented losses)
Survives chaos well with team protection but shows no offensive moves once in jersey (3 observations)
Time-trial strength allows solo breakaway sustain over 18km+ with climbing component (2 instances)
At 23, showed mature GC calculation beyond typical young rider aggression
form_trajectory: negative: Despite taking pink jersey tactically, repeated time losses on steep gradients and purely defensive riding suggest inability to sustain GC challenge against specialist climbers in mountain stages
